generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://example.com/base"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/dtdf"
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for predicting building performance scenarios"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analytical insights for optimizing building operations"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized solutions for building resource utilization"
]

instance SystemStateMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building system states for facility management"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for anticipating infrastructure issues"
]

instance InfrastructureOperation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for facility managers to operate building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for infrastructure management across building lifecycle",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for data-driven decision-making in AECO domain",
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for building performance enhancement",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for building system states and infrastructure operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoring
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for proactive infrastructure management",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated extraction and generation of DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance DataIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data exchange and integration from BCS components",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensors for physical monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived geometric models enhanced with Building Control System (BCS) components to establish a unified semantic foundation.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance RealTimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange mechanisms synchronizing physical building operations and digital counterparts",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators from Building Control System components for physical infrastructure control"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controllers from Building Control System components for managing system logic"
]

instance Building : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction and Operations (AECO) domain, serving as a cyber-physical asset for simulation, analysis, and optimization across its entire lifecycle from initial design to operation and refurbishment.",
    base:contains BIMGeometricModel, BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to automatically generate deployable artifacts, real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital systems, and evolution through modular integration of custom services. Roles including Building Control Engineers (device modeling), Facility Managers (monitoring and operation), and DT Engineers (custom service development) govern each phase, ensuring seamless transitions from static BIM representations to dynamic operational systems."
]
